title: LLM Execution Optimization
objective: Transform the LLM guidance into a calibrated execution framework. Create prompt templates, chain-of-thought scaffolds, output validators, and quality calibration benchmarks.
storyQuestions: What prompt structure produces the highest information efficiency scores?
How much context window does each decomposition step need?
Can we define a minimum viable storyboard quality bar?
What self-correction loops are most effective — re-running VERIFY or re-generating from BEAT?
baseAcceptanceChecks: 3+ prompt templates for different decomposition modes
Output validator spec that checks 6 computable metrics from JSON
Calibration benchmark: 3 test scenes with metric targets
Context window budget table per decomposition step
